title: IFAM, Magnetic Padlock, Model Mag40, with Magnetic Key, Anti-Vandal Padlock, 40 mm, Maximum Security, Hardened Steel and Chrome Arc
features: PRODUCT| The Mag40 magnetic lock is different from the whole family of padlocks since it is enough to bring your magnetic key closer to get the arch free. The attack on the lock is hindered thus being an anti-vandal lock.
Features | It is characterized by having a body made of zinc alloy and an arc made of hardened and chromed steel. Its opening/closing system is a magnetic system, without cylinder.
DIMENSIONS| The Mag40 model magnetic lock has a body base of 39 mm, a height of 62 mm and a thickness of 14.5 mm. The arch has a height of 30 mm and a diameter of 7 mm, as well as a light at 18.5 mm.

CONTENTS | This Mag40 magnetic lock has a magnetic key and includes two units of these. In addition, it is presented in a blister pack that helps to protect it. It lacks a cylinder so there is no attack hole.
RECOMMENDED| This lock is recommended for all types of users looking for a unique solution to maintain security. Due to the lack of a cylinder, lock pick attacks and dirt entry are avoided.
description: From the manufacturer The IFAM Group It was born in 1948, founded by Feliciano Aranzabal, a local industrialist. The company begins its activity as a manufacturer of padlocks. Soon the brand begins to gain prestige in the Spanish market for the quality of its padlocks, being recognized for its line of zinc alloy padlocks. Categories Cylinders for doors FAM offers you a wide range of door cylinders. You can choose between high safety cylinders, such as WX and RX series, cylinders with a good degree of protection such as those of the M Series and the M Series Anti Snap or opt for cheaper line solutions without at any time giving up the IFAM quality, as is the case with the D and C cylinder series. With a wide variety of lengths, anti-clamp, anti-drill, anti-snap and other resources to resist possible attacks on your lock, IFAM door cylinders are adapted to all kinds of needs. Locks IFAM locks provide you with different levels of security depending on your needs. If you want to protect the door of your home as much as possible you can resort to the W900B, four-bolt lock, and add a high security shield like the ES803. If you need a bolt, IFAM has innovative products such as the CS88LV high security shield plus bolt assembly. It also has the X5 bolt, to which you can attach most europrofile cylinders, although we recommend the extensive range of IFAM cylinders. Also, the brand also has tongue locks, optimal for mailboxes, furniture, boxes, etc. and handles, designed as a convenient and simple solution for passage doors. Locks that can be installed in a wide range of door widths. The quality of its materials, its careful design and the different finishes available make IFAM locks an excellent choice for those who demand maximum protection for their door. Padlocks IFAM's decades-long experience as a padlock manufacturer is reflected in a wide range, divided into six families: high-security padlocks, safety locks, brass, oxidation resistant, combination locks and Design Series. IFAM locks are designed for all user profiles: from companies and professionals, to individuals who need them for all types of uses. If you need padlocks for suitcases, stainless locks, lockers, padlocks of large or small dimensions, made of steel, brass or zinc alloy… In short, if you need a lock, do not hesitate to resort to the IFAM range. Anti-theft for bicycles The variety is the word that defines IFAM bicycle anti-theft. On the one hand, there are anti-theft cables, which have up to 8 different models, keyed opening or combination and lengths up to 2 meters. On the other hand, anti-theft chains. You can choose chains of up to 4 different lengths and the possibility of combining them with Typhoon Series padlocks. Whether you choose cable or chain burglars, whether your bike is road, mountain, or riding, for adult or child, IFAM bike locks are fully adapted to your needs. Anti-theft motorcycle Its extensive catalogue offers chain anti-theft, ground anchors, ball joint anti-theft, brake disc anti-theft and fork anti-theft, lever anti-theft, articulated anti-theft. Although the characteristics of each of these lines are different, there is a common denominator to all IFAM motorcycle anti-theft systems: the total adaptation to the user's needs in terms of safety levels. IFAM has a range of products ranging from the highest safety, such as the H14 chain, with a tensile strength of 15 tons, to anti-theft designed for small motorcycles and novel drivers such as the DF1, DF2 and DF3 disc burglary.
